channel.title: Video on MarkJacobsen.net
channel.description: Recent content in Video on MarkJacobsen.net

item.title: What’s it like to be a robot?
item.description:
Super interesting talk on how to adapt tech using robotics and the consequences of little design choices.

Please remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

item.title: The world organized by income
item.description:
Ever forget how fortunate you are? How, to use Warren Buffet’s term, you won the “ovarian lottery”? Watch this and check out the site (dollarstreet.org).

Please remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

item.title: Look Up
item.description:
Over three years old now, but still as valid as ever…

When you’re too busy looking down you don’t see the chances you miss.Please remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

Disclaimer: Thoughts and opinions are my own, and do not reflect the views of any employer, family member, friend, or anyone else. Some links may be affiliate links, but I don’t link to anything I don’t use myself.

item.title: Free yourself from your filter bubbles
item.description:
It probably wouldn’t hurt if we all freed ourselves from our own little filter bubble. That said, telling others their in a bubble or ridiculing them is probably not the best way to get a health dialog going. FWIW: I’m always open to a good conversation and sharing of ideas.

Free yourself from your filter bubblesPlease remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

Disclaimer: Thoughts and opinions are my own, and do not reflect the views of any employer, family member, friend, or anyone else. Some links may be affiliate links, but I don’t link to anything I don’t use myself.

item.title: Why Making Your Bed Every Morning Matters, According to a Navy SEAL
item.description:
Making your bed each morning seems like the least of our worries to start the day. However, according to Naval Adm. William McRaven, it may be the best way to start off your day.

Read the full article herePlease remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

item.title: Calculate Nearly Any Percentage In Your Head with Simple Tricks
item.description:
Whether you’re calculating a tip or just in need of some fast math, percentages can be something even math students goof. This video from YouTube channel MindYourDecisions shows you the easiest way to find those numbers in your head.

Read the full article herePlease remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

item.title: Go the F**k Home #1aDay
item.description:
Ok, so I’ve posted this one before, but I still love it every time I listen to it. Especially appreciate the part about leaders setting the example.

Sorry for the string of videos with “strong language”. I promise the next post will be “clean” 🙂

Read the full article herePlease remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!
